name: Easy Dill Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cucumbers and remove any stems. Cover with cold water and refrigerate overnight or for several hours.
2. Pack the cucumbers into pint jars as tightly as possible. Poke in 2 sprigs of dill.
3. Bring the cider vinegar, water, salt, and garlic cloves (12 to 16 cloves depending on your taste) to a boil.
4. Boil for 2 minutes. Remove the garlic cloves with a slotted spoon and place one in each jar (or to taste) while the brine cools slightly.
5. Pour the hot brine into the jars and seal.
Makes 12 pints.
